get.description: Exchange Google OAuth2 code for tokens. Requires oauth_state cookie set by /api/auth/google/login.

post.description: Authenticate user and return access + refresh tokens
Refresh access token using refresh token
Register a new user and return access + refresh tokens
Verify user email with verification token
Send email verification link to user email
Create a new hotel. `rating` is initialized by system (default 0), and `defaultChildMaxAge` defaults to 11 when omitted.
Upload images to S3 using multipart/form-data field `images`. To upload multiple files, send repeated `images` fields. Swagger 2 UI can only pick one file at a time for this endpoint.

parameters.description: Image file. Repeat this field to upload multiple files (e.g. -F \
parameters.name: images

post.description: Create a room amenity in master list.
Create a room type with images and optional amenityIds mapped in the same transaction.
Create inventory for a room on a specific date.
Search hotels by name/location, date range, occupancy, and filters. Returns hotels that can satisfy requested room count.
Return purchasable room combinations for a hotel under requested occupancy and date constraints.
Search available room types in a hotel by date range, occupancy, and room amenity filters.

patch.description: Change user's password with current password verification

description.example: Spacious room with city view and balcony

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
